nodes.label: __main__.py
nodes.rationale: Allow running the CLI via ``python -m trackr``.

nodes.label: cli.py
nodes.rationale: Command-line interface for trackr (built with Typer + Rich).

nodes.label: handle_errors()
nodes.rationale: Decorator: turn any :class:`TrackrError` into a clean exit(1).      Keeps comman

nodes.label: _main()
nodes.rationale: trackr root callback (hosts the global --version flag).

nodes.label: _parse_tags()
nodes.rationale: Split a comma-separated tag string, strip whitespace, reject empty labels.

nodes.label: init()
nodes.rationale: Initialize the task tracker in the current directory.

nodes.label: add()
nodes.rationale: Add a new task (status defaults to 'Todo').

nodes.label: list_tasks()
nodes.rationale: List tasks in a table (hides 'Done' tasks unless --all).

nodes.label: link()
nodes.rationale: Mark TASK_ID as depending on BLOCKER_ID (TASK_ID is blocked by BLOCKER_ID).

nodes.label: show()
nodes.rationale: Show full details for a single task, including dependencies.

nodes.label: project_list()
nodes.rationale: List all projects, marking the active one with '*'.

nodes.label: project_new()
nodes.rationale: Create a new project (does not switch the active project).

nodes.label: errors.py
nodes.rationale: Custom exceptions for trackr.  A single base class (:class:`TrackrError`) lets t

nodes.label: TrackrError
nodes.rationale: Base class for all expected, user-facing trackr errors.

nodes.label: NotInitialized
nodes.rationale: Raised when a command runs outside an initialized trackr repository.

nodes.label: AlreadyInitialized
nodes.rationale: Raised internally when init finds an existing store (handled gracefully).

nodes.label: TaskNotFound
nodes.rationale: Raised when a task ID does not exist in the current state.

nodes.label: InvalidStatus
nodes.rationale: Raised when a status string cannot be mapped to a known status.

nodes.label: EmptyDescription
nodes.rationale: Raised when attempting to add a task with a blank description.

nodes.label: CorruptState
nodes.rationale: Raised when the state file exists but cannot be parsed.

nodes.label: SelfDependency
nodes.rationale: Raised when a task is linked to itself.

nodes.label: CircularDependency
nodes.rationale: Raised when linking would create a dependency cycle.

nodes.label: NotLinked
nodes.rationale: Raised when trying to unlink tasks that are not linked.

nodes.label: InvalidTag
nodes.rationale: Raised when a tag label is empty or otherwise invalid.

nodes.label: NotTagged
nodes.rationale: Raised when trying to remove a tag that isn't present on the task.

nodes.label: ProjectExists
nodes.rationale: Raised when trying to create a project that already exists.

nodes.label: ProjectNotFound
nodes.rationale: Raised when a named project does not exist in the store.

nodes.label: InvalidProjectName
nodes.rationale: Raised when a project name is empty, reserved, or contains illegal characters.

nodes.label: models.py
nodes.rationale: Domain models: task status and the Task record itself.

nodes.label: Status
nodes.rationale: Lifecycle states for a task.      Inherits from ``str`` (instead of 3.11's ``Str

nodes.rationale: Map free-form user input to a canonical :class:`Status`.          Case-insensiti

nodes.label: _utcnow_iso()
nodes.rationale: Current UTC time as a second-precision ISO-8601 string.

nodes.label: .created_display()
nodes.rationale: Human-friendly ``YYYY-MM-DD`` date for table rendering.          Falls back to t

nodes.label: is_blocked()
nodes.rationale: Return True if *task* has at least one blocker that is not Done.

nodes.label: open_blockers()
nodes.rationale: Return the list of blocker tasks that are not yet Done.

nodes.label: topo_order()
nodes.rationale: Return *tasks* sorted in pipeline order: every task appears after all     tasks

nodes.label: would_cycle()
nodes.rationale: Return True if adding ``dependent -> blocker`` would create a cycle.      Uses D

nodes.rationale: Persistence layer: locate, create, read and write the ``.trackr`` store.  State

nodes.rationale: Walk upward from ``start`` (default: cwd) to find a ``.trackr/`` dir.      Retur

nodes.rationale: Atomically write *text* to *path* (temp file + fsync + os.replace).

nodes.label: read_active()
nodes.rationale: Return the active project name, defaulting to ``DEFAULT_PROJECT``.

nodes.label: set_active()
nodes.rationale: Set the active project pointer. Raises :class:`ProjectNotFound` if missing.

nodes.label: project_exists()
nodes.rationale: Return True if a project state file exists for *name*.

nodes.label: list_projects()
nodes.rationale: Return sorted list of all project names in the store.

nodes.rationale: Create a new project state file. Does not switch the active pointer.      Raises

nodes.rationale: Create ``.trackr/`` with ``default.json`` and ``active`` pointer.      Returns `

nodes.label: load_tasks()
nodes.rationale: Load and deserialize all tasks for *project* (default: active project).

nodes.label: save_tasks()
nodes.rationale: Persist ``tasks`` atomically to the project's state file.

nodes.rationale: Return a fresh 4-char hex ID not present in ``existing``.      With 65,536 possi

nodes.label: find_task()
nodes.rationale: Return the task matching ``task_id`` (case-insensitive), or ``None``.

nodes.label: conftest.py
nodes.rationale: Shared pytest fixtures.  Every test runs inside a throwaway ``tmp_path`` directo

nodes.label: workdir()
nodes.rationale: Chdir into an isolated temp directory; yield it. No .trackr/ yet.

nodes.label: initialized()
nodes.rationale: Like ``workdir`` but with the store already initialized.

nodes.label: runner()
nodes.rationale: A Typer/Click CLI runner for invoking commands in-process.

nodes.label: invoke()
nodes.rationale: Convenience: invoke the trackr app with a list of args -> Result.

nodes.label: test_cli.py
nodes.rationale: End-to-end CLI tests using Typer's CliRunner.  Each test runs in an isolated tem

nodes.label: _state()
nodes.rationale: Read the state JSON for the given project (default: active project).

nodes.label: .test_show_displays_blocks()
nodes.rationale: show should display what this task blocks (reverse direction).

nodes.label: .test_tasks_scoped_to_active_project()
nodes.rationale: Tasks added to default are NOT visible after switching project.

nodes.label: test_models.py
nodes.rationale: Unit tests for trackr.models: Status coercion and Task serialization.

nodes.label: .test_from_dict_missing_depends_on_defaults_empty()
nodes.rationale: v1 records without depends_on field must load without error.

nodes.label: .test_from_dict_missing_tags_defaults_empty()
nodes.rationale: v2 records without tags field must load without error (backward compat).

nodes.label: .test_not_blocked_when_blocker_missing()
nodes.rationale: Dangling ref (blocker deleted) — should not block.

nodes.label: TestTopoOrder
nodes.rationale: Tests for topo_order: blockers appear before the tasks that depend on them.

nodes.label: test_storage.py
nodes.rationale: Unit tests for trackr.storage: discovery, persistence, ID generation, projects.

nodes.label: .test_active_file_not_included()
nodes.rationale: active' pointer file must not appear in project listing.

nodes.label: .test_load_v2_file_migrates_tags()
nodes.rationale: A version:2 file without tags must load cleanly with tags=[].

nodes.label: .test_load_v1_file_migrates_both()
nodes.rationale: A version:1 file without depends_on/tags must load cleanly.

nodes.label: trackr CLI Application
nodes.rationale: Per-repo task tracker using Typer + Rich, Python 3.10+, stores tasks in .trackr/<project>.json at repo root following Git-style discovery

nodes.label: Schema Version 3
nodes.rationale: Task objects contain: id (4-char hex), description, status, created_at, depends_on (list), tags (list)

nodes.label: Status Enum
nodes.rationale: Persisted verbatim as Todo/In Progress/Done; input coerced via Status.coerce; must be class Status(str, Enum) not StrEnum for Python 3.10 compatibility

nodes.label: Task ID Generation
nodes.rationale: 4-char hex IDs, collision-checked, case-insensitive matching, widened on saturation

nodes.label: Atomic Write Pattern
nodes.rationale: Temp file + fsync + os.replace; never write state files in place; shared via _atomic_write_text

nodes.label: opencode/skills/trackr/SKILL.md
nodes.rationale: Canonical agent-facing usage doc for trackr; ships via just install-opencode into ~/.config/opencode/skills/trackr/

nodes.label: opencode/agents/trackr.md
nodes.rationale: Primary opencode agent that converts natural language input into trackr task operations; executes deterministically without confirmation

nodes.label: Task Granularity Rule
nodes.rationale: Task is one project-meeting bullet (feature, migration, milestone), not implementation steps; if it fits personal afternoon checklist it is too small

nodes.label: Project Management
nodes.rationale: Multiple independent task groups per repo; switch between projects with trackr project switch; names use [A-Za-z0-9._-], cannot be 'active' (reserved)

nodes.label: Task Dependencies
nodes.rationale: Link tasks for blocking; reject self-links and cycles; list output sorted in pipeline order; edges to hidden Done tasks ignored for ordering

nodes.label: TDD Development Rule
nodes.rationale: Failing test first, then implement to green; no feature/fix without test

nodes.label: Layer Separation Pattern
nodes.rationale: Keep layers separate: no business logic in cli.py; no stdout in storage.py; dependency direction: cli -> storage -> models -> errors (never invert)

nodes.label: Error Handling Pattern
nodes.rationale: Raise TrackrError subclass for user errors; @handle_errors decorator renders them; never show raw tracebacks

nodes.label: Stdlib-First Dependency Policy
nodes.rationale: Runtime deps: typer, rich only; Dev dep: pytest; do not add more without reason

nodes.label: Storage Discovery Pattern
nodes.rationale: Store at <repo-root>/.trackr/<project>.json; find_repo_root() walks up from any subdir; subcommands except init resolve repo this way

nodes.label: Status Alias Coercion
nodes.rationale: Case-insensitive input mapped to canonical status: Todo/In Progress/Done; multiple aliases per status

nodes.label: Tags Feature
nodes.rationale: Free-form labels on tasks; filter list with --tag (repeatable, any-match semantics)

nodes.label: Schema Migration Strategy
nodes.rationale: Bump STATE_VERSION on schema change; migrate in load_tasks; v1 (no depends_on, no tags) and v2 (no tags) load transparently with missing fields defaulting to []

nodes.label: Agent Execution Workflow
nodes.rationale: Execute deterministically; translate input to CLI mutations without proposals; the board is the record; every operation lands in trackr immediately

nodes.label: Pipeline Ordering Algorithm
nodes.rationale: Rows sorted so blockers appear above dependent tasks; tasks without dependencies preserve insertion order; edges to hidden Done tasks ignored

nodes.label: Blocked Task Warning
nodes.rationale: Moving blocked task to In Progress or Done prints warning listing open blockers but allows it
